articles.description: LiteLLM had obtained two security compliance certifications via Delve and fell victim to some horrific credential-stealing malware last week.

topStories.title: US raises concern over Israel’s closure of Jerusalem holy sites
topStories.description: The White House says the US has raised concerns with Israel over closure of Jerusalem holy sites.

topStories.title: Iran’s foreign ministry rejects US ceasefire demands
topStories.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman says US conditions for a ceasefire are ‘excessive, unrealistic and unreasonable’.

topStories.title: Key moments from Marco Rubio’s interview with Al Jazeera
topStories.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio spoke exclusively to Al Jazeera’s Hashem Ahelbarra about the war on Iran.

topStories.title: Is a peaceful settlement possible in Iran?
topStories.description: Pakistan says it is ready to host talks on ending the US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.description: White House's Karoline Leavitt says passing the conflict's costs off to regional states is 'an idea' Donald Trump has.

topStories.title: US Going To Retake Control Of Straits Of Hormuz: US Treasury Chief
topStories.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Monday in an interview with Fox News that the United States is going to retake control of the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Rubio says NATO must be re-examined after Spain blocks US operation on Iran
topStories.description: Marco Rubio said it was “very disappointing” that NATO allies blocked the use of their bases for the US's war on Iran.

topStories.title: As more Americans adopt AI tools, fewer say they can trust the results
topStories.description: AI adoption is rising in the U.S., but trust remains low, with most Americans concerned about transparency, regulation, and the technology’s broader societal impact, according to a new Quinnipiac poll.

topStories.title: US embassy reopens in Venezuela months after Maduro abduction
topStories.description: The US has reopened its embassy in Venezuela, nearly three months after it abducted the former leader Nicolas Maduro.

topStories.title: US Stocks: S&P, Nasdaq end lower as investors weigh Middle East conflict outlook
topStories.description: U.S. stocks closed mostly lower as President Trump's conflicting messages on Iran and escalating Middle East conflict weighed on markets.  Despite optimism over discussions, threats to the Strait of Hormuz and Iranian oil facilities fueled investor concerns.  Fed Chair Powell's comments on inflation offered some support, while financial stocks rose on new 401(k) guidelines.

dailyNews.title: Rubio denies US actions punitive, blames Cuba for economic failures

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran to ‘immediately’ reopen Strait of Hormuz, threatens strikes on oil sites, power plants & Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: President Trump warned Iran that the US may escalate its response if a deal is not reached soon regarding the Strait of Hormuz. He mentioned potential strikes on key Iranian infrastructure while expressing confidence in ongoing discussions with ‘new’ leadership in Iran.

dailyNews.title: French police make two more arrests over foiled attack on Bank of America
dailyNews.description: Prosecutors investigating suspected link to Iran war due to similarities with other recent attempted attacks in Europe.

dailyNews.description: USIsraelIran War Live The war in Iran is running according to plan White House says

dailyNews.title: Cuba waits for Russian oil tanker to arrive amid US blockade
dailyNews.description: After a US blockade, Cuba is waiting on the arrival of a sanctioned Russian tanker carrying thousands of barrels of oil.

dailyNews.title: US Embassy Resumes Operations In Venezuela After 7 Years
dailyNews.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio hailed progress in Venezuela, saying it is beginning to see "the kind of stability that brings businesses back."

dailyNews.title: US airport lines shorten as TSA workers get paid
dailyNews.description: Airports like JFK and Houston report shorter wait times, though LaGuardia still faces delays of up to two hours.

dailyNews.title: Congress Candidate Assaulted In Assam, Party Workers Stage Protests
dailyNews.description: Assam elections: Sunil Chhetri, a former president of the All Assam Gorkha Students' Union, was attacked by a group that the Congress alleged comprised BJP workers.

dailyNews.title: Barbie Dream Fest in Florida to issue refunds after fan complaints
dailyNews.description: Fans, who paid up to $450 (£340), complained of a grey convention centre backdrop and a "swag bag" that included only a plastic pouch with a Barbie hand sanitiser.

dailyNews.title: Parliament Budget Session updates: Maoism has been almost eradicated from Bastar, the region is now on the path of development, says Amit Shah
dailyNews.description: Congress MP Digvijaya Singh says CAPF Bill will make the discriminations faced by the officials permanent as RS takes up discussion on CAPF (General Administration) Bill, 2026

topStories.description: The animation opens with a Lego version of Trump seated in the Oval Office, appearing under pressure as he gazes out at large crowds protesting outside.

topStories.title: White House ballroom project: Trump reveals military building large complex beneath it, says 'we're ahead of schedule'
topStories.description: US President Trump revealed plans for a large military complex beneath a new ballroom at the White House. The ballroom project, one of the most undertakings at White House in more than a century, has expanded significantly, with its privately funded budget rising from $200 million to $400 million.

topStories.title: Trump Claims ‘Regime Change’ in Iran Is Already Complete
topStories.description: President Trump suggested that Iran’s current leaders were “much more reasonable” as he sought to show progress in his war aims. Iran’s power structure appears firmly in control despite a month of U.S.-Israeli attacks.

topStories.title: Mexico Pressures U.S. Over Deaths of Its Citizens in ICE Custody
topStories.description: Claudia Sheinbaum, president of Mexico, said her country would take legal steps to demand better conditions at immigration detention facilities, where she said 14 Mexican citizens have died since President Trump took office.

dailyNews.title: ‘I Think That MAGA Is Dying:’ Inside the Youth Movement at CPAC
dailyNews.description: At a sparsely attended Conservative Political Action Conference, young Republicans were eager to start the post-Trump era.

dailyNews.title: As Trump Squeezes Cuba, U.S. Military Exists in a Bubble
dailyNews.description: The Navy base at Guantánamo Bay sparkles at night while neighbors across a Cuban minefield struggle in darkness driven by a Trump fuel embargo.

dailyNews.title: Trump Reveals New Look for White House Ballroom After Times Article
dailyNews.description: Architects and preservation organizations have warned that little scrutiny has been given to the project’s design plans.

dailyNews.title: States Plow Ahead With A.I. Regulation, Defying Trump
dailyNews.description: States ranging from California to Utah are taking steps to place guardrails on the technology even after the president ordered them to stop.

dailyNews.title: NBA's Tristan Thompson supports immigration done 'the right way' in nuanced comments on Trump crackdown
dailyNews.description: Longtime NBA player Tristan Thompson said he supported immigrating "the right way" but argued enforcement should be handled on a case-by-case basis.

dailyNews.title: Karoline Leavitt fires back at NBC News reporter who asked if Trump's Iran threat amounts to a 'war crime'
dailyNews.description: Karoline Leavitt pushes back on war crimes question after Trump threatened to obliterate Iranian power plants and oil wells over the Hormuz Strait.

dailyNews.title: Special Operations Forces, Marines and Army troops now in Middle East, sources say
dailyNews.description: The forces give Trump military options in Iran, including operations that could target opening the Strait of Hormuz, take oil from Kharg Island or seize Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium, sources said.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to invade Iran, "obliterate" its energy resources
dailyNews.description: Energy markets remain volatile as President Trump threatens Iran with an invasion to seize its oil while also suggesting a deal could soon end the war.

dailyNews.title: TSA workers start receiving paychecks after weeks of financial strain
dailyNews.description: TSA workers across the country are starting to receive about a month's worth of back pay after President Trump signed an executive order last week. Kris Van Cleave reports.

dailyNews.title: Former Mossad official says Iran was underestimated by Trump administration
dailyNews.description: As the Iran-backed Houthis in Yemen join the conflict with Israel, a former Mossad official tells Holly Williams that the Iranians were underestimated.

dailyNews.title: Trump claims deal is possible with Iran while threatening strikes on energy sector
dailyNews.description: President Trump argues he's making progress in talks with Iran, but threatened to blow up Iran's energy sector if talks fail. Ed O'Keefe has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Tehran downplays talks with U.S. as American troops increase presence in Middle East
dailyNews.description: Hundreds of U.S. special operations forces are now stationed in the Middle East as President Trump leaves the door open to a potential ground operation in Iran. CBS News' Eleanor Watson and Aaron Navarro have the latest.
